title: Dishwasher Cavity Sizing Guide
description: Installation-first dishwasher cavity sizing references for Australian kitchens, with links to brand clearance pages, compare pages, and nearby fridge cavity benchmarks.

title: Washing Machine Doorway Access Guide
description: Delivery and installation access planning for washing machines across Australian homes, including doorway benchmarks and model-level clearance references.

title: Fridge Clearance Requirements Guide
description: A central fridge clearance index covering major Australian brands, side/rear/top spacing differences, and comparison pages for high-intent fit checks.

title: Dryer Ventilation & Safety Guide
description: Dryer placement references, ventilation requirements, and cross-links into high-efficiency dryer models and comparison pages for apartment-safe installs.

title: Appliance Fit Sizing Handbook
description: Master hub for appliance cavity, doorway, brand, and compare pages. Use this handbook to traverse every FitAppliance sizing resource in one place.
